title: Saint John woman wins battle with Immigration over rejected work permit - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Saint John woman wins battle with Immigration over rejected work permit
Senior Associate, Alannah Glintz , was featured in CBC News, sharing insight on the growing number of post-graduation work permit refusals impacting international students across Canada.
